agent_entry.runs: number — total runs for this agent
agent_entry.avgScore: number 1-10 — average quality score across runs

specializations.<task-type>: number — avg score for this task type (api-endpoint, migration, ui-component, test-writing, refactor, etc.)

_roi_lifecycle.low: avgScore < 6.0 on 5+ runs → put on watch
_roi_lifecycle.watch: 3 more runs on watch with no improvement → propose retirement to user
_roi_lifecycle.retired: user confirmed retirement, agent no longer allocated

_allocation.prefer: avgScore > 9.0 for task type AND roi = high
_allocation.avoid: avgScore < 7.0 for task type on 3+ runs OR roi = watch/retired
_allocation.fallback: use template default if no strong signal
